title: India Becoming More Of An Issue For Dry Bulk
section_path: India Becoming More Of An Issue For Dry Bulk
section_path_text: India Becoming More Of An Issue For Dry Bulk
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, India is on pace to produce 116.7 billion kilowatt hours of electricity this month. This would mark a month-on-month decline of 11.9 billion kilowatt hours (-9%) and a year-on-year decline of 4.4 billion kilowatt hours (-4%). This would mark the seventh time in the last eleven months that India's total electricity production has contracted on a year-on-year basis.
